control_description: Compare ecommerce lines, invoices, payments and refunds by day/month
Recompute VAT at 15% and compare to source tax amount within tolerance
Every BI order/invoice should map to a SAP document number after posting
Every product category maps to valid SAP item group, revenue account, COGS account and VAT code
Fabric/ADF loads must finish before finance close cut-off
Sales incl. VAT less refunds/fees equals payment settlement within timing tolerance
Hash/anonymize customer identifiers for analytics where detailed identity is not needed
Persist source files, run logs, row counts, hashes and exception register
